form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he goes well over this track and distance with six wins from 12 starts. Has run blistering time here with a 19.53 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths at Taree Super Track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Taree Super Track three back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 340m at this track in 20.08, set up by a fast early sectional. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.
